nodes.title: The Dry Fountain
nodes.text: The fountain is dry. Someone left a coat on the bench nearby. The water stains on the basin are old. Nothing moves here.

nodes.title: The Station Concourse
nodes.text: The departure board shows no departures. A few chairs remain bolted to the floor. The light through the high windows is flat and grey.

nodes.title: The Back Alley
nodes.text: A pipe drips somewhere. The walls are close. A sign has been turned to face the brick. You cannot read what it says.

nodes.title: The Maintenance Tunnel
nodes.text: The ceiling is low. A row of numbered doors, most with no handles. The floor slopes gently in one direction. It is very quiet.

nodes.title: The Side Street
nodes.text: A bicycle leans against the wall. It has been here long enough that the wall has left a mark on it. At the far end a lamp is on, though it is not dark.

nodes.title: The Room With A Clock
nodes.text: The clock on the wall shows a time you do not recognise. The table has one chair. The window is painted over from the inside. Someone has been careful here.
